title: QuantumSpark — Quantum & Photonics Ideathon 2025
subtitle: To encourage students to apply photonics and quantum concepts to solve real-world problems through innovative ideation.
description: QuantumSpark was an online ideathon conducted on 25th June 2025 where participants submitted photonics-based ideas via Unstop and shortlisted teams presented their solutions live on Zoom with simulations and diagrams, followed by a Q&A.
location: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, New Delhi
highlights: Shortlisting based on innovation and feasibility
Cash Prizes: Winner ₹1,200 | First Runner Up ₹800
